data.name: Home_HeroSubtitle
data.value: MeetCampus is a non-profit, open-source dating platform built by students, for students. No pay-to-win algorithms, no hidden fees—just your campus community, exactly as it is.

data.name: Home_ManifestoTitle
data.value: A space built on trust, not data.

data.name: Home_ManifestoBody
data.value: We believe you shouldn't have to sacrifice your privacy for a connection. By combining academic verification with user anonymity, we've created the first dating space where you can be yourself, safely.

data.name: Home_ManifestoQuote
data.value: "The best connections happen when people feel secure enough to show up as their authentic selves."

data.name: Home_PromiseSubtitle
data.value: Built on principles, not profit. Here's what makes MeetCampus different.

data.name: Home_Promise1Body
data.value: MeetCampus is 100% free. We don't have investors to satisfy or ads to show you. We exist solely to help you find that person in your 10:00 AM lecture or your favorite study spot.

data.name: Home_Promise2Body
data.value: On other apps, you pay to be seen. Here, everyone is equal. Our algorithm doesn't prioritize "boosts" or "super-likes"—it simply connects you based on who you are and what you care about.

data.name: Home_Promise3Body
data.value: We are open-source. This app is maintained and managed by student developers and campus communities. Transparency isn't just a feature; it's our foundation.

data.name: Home_Promise4Body
data.value: No bots. No scammers. No fake "influencer" accounts. By requiring a .edu or university-issued email for every single registration, we ensure that the person you're chatting with actually goes to your school.

data.name: Home_Promise5Body
data.value: While we verify your status as a student, we respect your privacy. You have total control over your profile—choose to display your legal name or pick a preferred nickname. You decide how you want to be known on campus.

data.name: Home_Step1Body
data.value: Sign in with your university email. We ensure every profile belongs to a real student on your campus.

data.name: Home_Step2Body
data.value: Our features and community guidelines are shaped by student moderators, not a corporate board.

data.name: Home_Step3Body
data.value: Curious how you were matched? You can literally check our code. No "hotness scores," no secrets.

data.name: Home_Trust1Body
data.value: Every user is a student. Period.

data.name: Home_Trust2Body
data.value: Your true name is only shared if you want it to be.

data.name: Home_Trust3Body
data.value: No hidden algorithms tracking your behavior.

data.name: Home_CtaSubtitle
data.value: Join thousands of students discovering genuine connections at their campus.

data.name: Testing_Description
data.value: This page is available only to authenticated users.
